description_long: This trash bin features a robust, polygonal body with a warm, orange-brown metallic finish and distinct paneling, giving it a modern, industrial look suitable for urban environments. The main receptacle is vertically oriented with beveled edges and reinforced seams, suggesting durability and resistance to vandalism. The top section has a wide, slanted opening for depositing waste, and a separate, removable lid component is visible above the main body, likely for maintenance access. The lid is cylindrical with a slightly domed top and a dark, translucent band around its circumference. There are no visible handles or wheels, and the bin appears to be designed for stationary placement. The exterior is unmarked, with no visible signage or labeling, and the surface has a semi-glossy, hard metallic texture.
description: A polygonal, orange-brown metal trash bin with a slanted opening and a removable domed lid, featuring reinforced seams and a semi-glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main panel with a wide, slanted opening and the removable domed lid above.
description_view_1: Angled side view reveals the beveled edges and the depth of the slanted opening.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the symmetrical paneling and the absence of any access doors or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view mirrors view 1, showing the other side's paneling and opening depth.
